mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_mcp_tool_audit_log (tool_name, server_name, version, user_id, username, dept_id, tenant_id, status, cost_millis, error_message, create_time) VALUES (#{toolName}, #{serverName}, #{version}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{deptId}, #{tenantId}, #{status}, #{costMillis}, #{errorMessage}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_mcp_tool_audit_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE()
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(cost_millis)), 0) FROM ai_mcp_tool_audit_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND cost_millis IS NOT NULL
